notes: Audit fixes C4 + C5 + C6 (batched on top of deployed v1.6.62). C6 (signedOffBy): deploy_advancePhase now stamps signedOffBy on phase completion (identity_getUser() || buildLead || 'Tech'), mirroring deploy_logAudit's actor resolution — phase sign-off attribution is no longer 'unknown' for new completions. C4 (tamper-evident audit chain): vendored js-sha256 v0.11.0 (sha256.min.js, SHA-256 5e623445…, eager-loaded + precached); deploy_logAudit now self-hashes each entry over a fixed field whitelist and chains prevHash→hash; FIFO truncation at 2,000 annotates the new head with a recorded chainReset (count + last dropped hash) instead of silently dropping; deploy_verifyAuditChain detects content tampering / broken links / tolerates authorized resets; the audit viewer shows a CHAIN VERIFIED / CHAIN BROKEN banner. Synchronous, degrades to no-hash if lib absent (never throws). C5 (atomic restore): phantomImport now snapshots overwritten keys, pre-checks ~4.5MB headroom, writes all-or-nothing, and rolls back to the snapshot on any safeStore failure (no torn restore); referential-integrity extended to drop phases/optics whose rackId references a dropped rack; restored audit head marked chainReset (C4 interaction). No CSS changes; sw.js change = precache sha256 + stamp. Verified: both inline scripts + sw.js + sha256 lib node --check OK; sha256('abc') vector matched; helpers defined once; three stamps aligned at v1.6.63.
